zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill於大約1504年出生時，她的父親John Hill35歲，母親Blanche Suger25歲。她於1522年與James Hedge結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1567年1月30日享年64歲。

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill was born about 1504, her father, John Hill, was 35 and her mother, Blanche Suger, was 25. She married James Hedge in 1522. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 January 1567, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill est née environ 1504, son père, John Hill, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Blanche Suger, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé James Hedge en 1522. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1567, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill um 1504 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Hill 35 und ihre Mutter Blanche Suger 25. Sie hat 1522 James Hedge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1567 im Alter von 64 Jahren.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elysabethe Susan Hillが約1504年に生まれた時，父John Hillは35歳，母Blanche Sugerは25歳であった。1522年にJames Hedgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1567年1月30日に64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill(이)가 대략 1504년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hill(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Blanche Suger(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1522년 James Hedge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1567년 1월 30일 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elysabethe Susan Hill родилась около 1504 г., её отцу по имени John Hill было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche Suger, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Hedge в 1522 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1567 г. в возрасте 64 лет.
